name: Heart-y Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lentils with water and bay leaf for about 30 minutes, until lentils are soft but still hold their shape.
2. Remove bay leaves and drain any excess water.
3. In a saucepan, sauté onions, garlic, and herbs in the broth over medium heat until fragrant, about 5 minutes.
4. Add chopped tomatoes and tomato paste; stir to combine.
5. Simmer uncovered for 20 minutes, or until the sauce has slightly thickened.
6. Stir in the cooked lentils and simmer an additional 10 minutes.
7. Serve over pasta.
